reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. Impecables las instalaciones .
El café bien caliente con riquísimas medialunas . Ideal para un buen desayuno.

Excellent service. The facilities are spotless.
The coffee was piping hot, and the croissants were delicious. Perfect for a great breakfast.
